title: Subitems do not persist the parent column names
excerpt: I created a board with my desired columns. When I create a subitem, all of the column names change back to default and do not keep my customized names. This sucks.

posts.author: koalabear (Mel Master)
posts.cookedHtml: I created a board with my desired columns. When I create a subitem, all of the column names change back to default and do not keep my customized names. This sucks.
